title: Action Configurations
description: Configuration schemas for all automation actions

identifiers.description: Ordered fallback identifiers to locate the target element

selectors.description: Ordered fallback selectors to locate the target element

selector.description: CSS selector for element to click

force_click.description: Force click even if element not clickable

scroll_into_view.description: Scroll element into view before clicking

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present

hold_duration.description: Duration to hold click in milliseconds

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present

selector.description: CSS selector for element to wait for

timeout.description: Maximum time to wait in milliseconds

wait_for_interactable.description: Wait for element to be interactable

fallback_to_duration.description: Fallback to duration wait if element wait fails

fallback_duration.description: Duration to wait if fallback triggered

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present
Wait for element to be present

selector.description: CSS selector to target form field

identifiers.description: Ordered fallback identifiers for this field

selectors.description: Ordered fallback selectors for this field

wait_for_elements.description: Wait for all form elements to be present

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present
Wait for element to be present

function_name.description: Main function name to invoke after loading the code

input_parameters.description: Input parameter mappings for the main function

selector.description: CSS selector for element to send keys to

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present

selector.description: Element to scroll (optional, defaults to window)
CSS selector for element to check

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present
Wait for element to be present

url.description: URL to open in new tab

tab_title.description: Tab title to switch to (alternative to index)

true_path.description: Path to take if condition is true

false_path.description: Path to take if condition is false

then_actions.description: Actions to execute if condition is true

else_actions.description: Actions to execute if condition is false

condition.description: Condition to continue loop (for condition loops)

array_variable.description: Variable containing array to iterate (for foreach loops)

item_variable.description: Variable name for current item (for foreach loops)

actions.description: Actions to execute in each iteration

max_iterations.description: Maximum iterations to prevent infinite loops

source_selector.description: CSS selector for element to drag

target_selector.description: CSS selector for drop target (required in element mode)

drop_mode.description: Drag mode: resolve by target element or by source-relative pointer offset

target_offset_x.description: Horizontal drag offset in pixels for offset mode

target_offset_y.description: Vertical drag offset in pixels for offset mode

target_value.description: Explicit target value for range/slider controls

source_identifiers.description: Ordered fallback identifiers for drag source

source_selectors.description: Ordered fallback selectors for drag source

target_identifiers.description: Ordered fallback identifiers for drag target

target_selectors.description: Ordered fallback selectors for drag target

wait_for_element.description: Wait for elements to be present

input_parameters.description: Input parameters to pass to subflow

frame_identifiers.description: Ordered fallback identifiers for the frame element

frame_selectors.description: Ordered fallback selectors for the frame element

preserve_local_storage.description: Preserve local storage across viewport changes

preserve_session_storage.description: Preserve session storage across viewport changes

wait_for_element.description: Wait for element to be present

text.description: Text to enter in prompt popup

confidence.description: Match threshold used for image detection

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval while waiting for image matches

grayscale.description: Use grayscale matching for better performance

useRegion.description: Limit search to a specific screen region

image.description: Base64 encoded reference image to locate on the desktop

requireStability.description: Require the image to remain visible for a stable period

stableDurationMs.description: How long the match should remain stable before succeeding

outputVariable.description: Variable to store desktop match metadata

failOnTimeout.description: Fail action when image does not appear in time

image.description: Base64 encoded reference image to locate on the desktop

waitForImage.description: Wait for image appearance before returning

outputVariable.description: Variable to store found image match metadata

failIfNotFound.description: Fail action when image cannot be located

image.description: Base64 encoded reference image to click

button.description: Mouse button to use for clicking

intervalMs.description: Delay between multiple clicks in milliseconds

offsetX.description: Horizontal click offset from detected center

offsetY.description: Vertical click offset from detected center

waitForImage.description: Wait until image appears before clicking

button.description: Mouse button to use for clicking

intervalMs.description: Delay between multiple clicks in milliseconds

outputVariable.description: Variable to store click coordinate metadata

text.description: Text to type on the desktop

intervalMs.description: Delay between key presses in milliseconds

clickImageFirst.description: Click target image before typing to focus input

image.description: Optional target image used when clickImageFirst is enabled

waitForImage.description: Wait for image before attempting focus click

relative.description: Treat x and y as offsets from current pointer location

outputVariable.description: Variable to store pointer position metadata

presses.description: How many times to trigger the hotkey

intervalMs.description: Delay between repeated hotkeys in milliseconds

workingDirectory.description: Optional working directory for command execution

failOnNonZero.description: Fail action when command exits with non-zero code

outputVariable.description: Variable to store command result details

useRegion.description: Capture a specific region of the desktop

outputVariable.description: Variable to store screenshot metadata and base64 content
